name: gitbook
description: Use GitBook's public skill for GitBook site orchestration and page authoring in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build and edit GitBook docs in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages GitBook's public GitBook skill for Codex, covering site orchestration, GitBook REST API workflows, Git Sync handoffs, branding customization, migrations, and GitBook-flavored Markdown authoring. Also includes a read-only MCP connection to GitBook's published product documentation.
defaultPrompt: Use GitBook to draft this docs page.
Plan a GitBook site structure for this product.
Prepare a GitBook Git Sync handoff.
